recent_sources.title: Micron Technology, Inc. Reports Record Results for the Third Quarter of Fiscal 2026
recent_sources.note: Primary IR release confirms record FQ3, large cash generation, high capex, and AI memory scarcity read-through for HBM/DRAM/NAND peers.

recent_sources.title: Micron and General Motors Sign Strategic Agreement to Secure Supply and Accelerate Innovation
recent_sources.note: IR homepage lists GM supply agreement after the Anthropic agreement; strengthens theme that large customers are seeking longer-term memory supply certainty.

recent_sources.title: Sandisk's stock could follow record-breaking quarter with another big jump, analysts say
recent_sources.note: Accessible summary says analysts focused on more favorable long-term agreement structures, stronger pricing lock-in, and enterprise SSD/datacenter demand; treat as secondary sentiment, not primary company guidance.

recent_sources.title: Honeywell Technologies Launches as Independent, Pure-Play Automation Company Following Completion of Honeywell Aerospace Spin-Off
recent_sources.note: Primary IR update confirms post-spin HON is automation-focused; aerospace and space-supply-chain exposure now sits mainly with separately traded Honeywell Aerospace, so monitor HON/HONA entity confusion.

recent_sources.title: Honeywell Aerospace completes spin-off from Honeywell Technologies and begins trading on Nasdaq
recent_sources.note: Primary aerospace-company release says HONA is the independent aerospace and defense supplier; legacy HON space/avionics read-through should be treated cautiously after spin.
